name: Qiita
description: Japans largest engineer knowledge-sharing community — OAuth-protected API for articles, tags and user data.

seo.title: Qiita — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Qiita: Japans largest engineer knowledge-sharing community — OAuth-protected API for articles, tags and user data.

when_to_use: Japanese developer article search via OAuth API
Tag-based content discovery for tech knowledge portals
User and follower data API for community analytics
Engineering blog aggregation from Japanese tech teams
Content API for Japanese developer knowledge tools

pros: Largest Japanese engineer knowledge community by volume
OAuth API exposes articles, tags, and user data
Solid source for trend analysis in JP engineering
cons: Rate limits and pagination are strict
Content quality varies widely by author
API surface is thin beyond articles and tags
review.verdict: The go-to data source for the Japanese engineering community; outside that audience there are better global options.
review.best_for: Apps analyzing Japanese engineering trends or syndicating JP tech content.
review.not_for: Global dev community platforms or English-only content pipelines.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Content in platform, API for export
